mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which tends to depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the housing market signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which tends to boost S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals a weakening supply of goods and services, which tends to depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decrease in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the consumer price index signals a weakening demand for goods and services, which tends to depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor force participation rate signals a weakening labor market, which tends to depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the retail sales signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which tends to boost S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decrease in the inflation rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
